title: eriosema pumilum var. lanceolatum
intro: Eriosema pumilum var. lanceolatum, also known as the Bush Violet, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The medicinal properties of Eriosema pumilum var. lanceolatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. This plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, Eriosema pumilum var. lanceolatum is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be used to promote overall well-being and health.
